title: Quick Note
desc: Bottom-Right Hot Corner. Move mouse there to instantly create a Note (often links to current website).
settingsPath: Desktop & Dock → Hot Corners… → Bottom Right: Quick Note

compatibility.notes: Quick Note is available in macOS Monterey (12) or later. On macOS 12, the path is typically Desktop & Screen Saver → Hot Corners…; on macOS 13+, it is Desktop & Dock → Hot Corners…
